mapper.select: SELECT p.* FROM post p WHERE p.audit_status = 1 AND p.visibility = 0 AND p.deleted = 0 ORDER BY ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM like_collect lc WHERE lc.target_id = p.id AND lc.type = 1 ) DESC, p.create_time DESC

SELECT p.* FROM post p WHERE p.audit_status = 1 AND p.visibility = 0 AND p.deleted = 0 ORDER BY ( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM like_collect lc WHERE lc.target_id = p.id AND lc.type = 1) * 1 + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment c WHERE c.post_id = p.id) * 2 + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM like_collect lcc WHERE lcc.target_id = p.id AND lcc.type = 3) * 3 ) DESC, p.create_time DESC
